title: Front Office Manager - Best Western India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Best Western India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Best Western India in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Best Western India:
Best Western India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Best Western India!
